title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
